name: Last Connection
description: Two strangers on the same night train share nothing but a failing onboard wifi. They never speak in person — only through messages. Every stop brings them one station closer to the one where someone gets off for good.

images.narrative_caption: 23:40 to the coast. Wifi works four minutes, dies for six. You learn to make the four count.
Nobody talks on this train. They just glow, each in their own little rectangle of light.
'is anyone else's wifi useless or is it just me.' Six minutes of nothing. Then: 'it's everyone's.'
Connection lost. Six minutes to think about what you almost typed. Six minutes to delete it.
The train splits at the junction. Whoever gets off first disappears into a different morning.
